title: NULL SCRIPT
body:
# NULL SCRIPT 🕳️

> *"It never was. It was always in your head."*

**NULL SCRIPT** is a terrifying modpack built around psychological horror and corrupted reality. Inspired by the eerie experiences of [`ITS NOT REAL`](https://modrinth.com/mod/its-not-real) and [`The Broken Script`](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script), this pack will have you constantly questioning what’s real... and what’s not.

---

## 👁️ What to Expect

- **🕶️ Black Entities** – Strange, faceless creatures roam the world, watching from afar.
- **👤 Null** – The central figure of fear. He appears unexpectedly and his presence alone can break you.
- **🧠 Reality Distortion** – The environment, audio, and game behavior randomly change—sometimes subtly, sometimes... not.
- **😵 Paranoia** – You'll feel like you're being watched. You're not wrong.
- **🪞 Close Your Eyes** – Press `G` to shut your eyes when things get *too* weird... but that might make it worse.

---

## ⚠️ Warnings

- **Not multiplayer safe** – Built for a **single-player horror experience** only.
- **May interact with system files** – Expect files, glitches, or sounds to appear *outside* the game (part of the horror).
- **Contains jumpscares, disturbing visuals, and psychological triggers** – Not for the faint of heart.

---

## 🔧 Commands & Configuration

- `/tbs_config` – Configure core behaviors from *The Broken Script*.
- `/removevhs` – Removes VHS-style screen effects.
- `/safemode` – Turns off creepy file-writing/system behaviors for a lighter experience.

---

**This is not just a modpack. It’s a descent into the unknown. Welcome to NULL SCRIPT.**
